segment.source: Renders a page-top band with eyebrow, large headline and subheadline above a search form: an icon-decorated input named q with configurable placeholder and a submit button, sent via GET to a selectable target page. Use it for: the head of search-result, help-center, documentation or knowledge-base pages where finding content is the main task. Prefer 'Search Hero' for a homepage or portal opener built around search; this element tops a dedicated search page.
